description: External Claude Code plugins to install. These are NOT stored in the repo — only tracked here so setup is reproducible.

plugins.name: obsidian-skills
plugins.description: Obsidian Flavored Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, CLI, and Defuddle skills by Steph Ango (Obsidian CEO)

plugins.name: argos-cli
plugins.description: Operate the Argos visual regression CLI (official skill from argos-ci)
plugins.install: npx skills add argos-ci/argos-javascript -g -a claude-code -s argos-cli -y

plugins.name: argos-pr-review
plugins.description: Review Argos visual regression builds on PRs (official skill from argos-ci)
plugins.install: npx skills add argos-ci/argos-javascript -g -a claude-code -s argos-pr-review -y
